str_39BEA52A: Samuel and I stood on the beach under the scorching midday sun.
str_3AD2D95D: A brief pause hung in the air, broken by his words.
str_5E2F7E50: I'm sorry you had to face this.
str_53EA4021: In my visions, the twilight has thickened around you.
str_44AB723F: I saw you in the darkness.
str_177699C6: I've been seeing a lot of things lately too.
str_EB252260: Child, despite my visions, I don't think what's happening to you is mysticism.
str_DD33386B: I don't think so. And even if they are, I can't understand them.
str_1B72E57C: Right now I don't need clues, I need proof that I'm innocent.
str_2BB77308: This is all a test of fate.
str_63AC83B6: Ha. Maybe your visions have something that can help me?
str_3D5263EF: Hard to say, do you want to know something specific?
str_B281AB2B: Never mind, I don't think it will help me.
str_DCC3E741: Yes, I want to know something.
str_039FEE11: In the darkness that surrounds you, I cannot see that person.
str_DE9D3B10: But I see that this person is too close to you right now.
str_B80A7657: I see that your freedom is under great threat. But there is a person who will help you preserve it.
str_73FC4CC9: A person who has power, but does he have a good attitude towards you? That I don't know.
str_ED46D112: And most importantly, don't even believe yourself.
str_5DBC2C56: I shouldn't have believed that you could help.
str_02E98BDE: He who seeks will find, he who listens will hear.
str_A77E3797: The darkness around you won't let me help. It engulfs everyone nearby.
str_9D0263EA: And I'd better continue on my own path.
str_06538A6A: The old man slowly trudged away, and I was left alone again.
str_ACE7F0C2: Why am I only surrounded by riddles? Can't anything just be simpler...
str_8C04A11B: I decided to head towards the club.
str_A8F18E41: Repeating the same action is madness.
str_439216D2: Yet I walk in circles, never finding answers. So who am I?
str_F726C51D: I'm glad to see you too.
str_00B9C779: Have you figured out what you'll be doing for the next 25 years?
str_4BEEED95: Shut up! How pathetic do you have to be to hang around this godforsaken city all day long!
str_7CCCB8A6: You're a terrible conversationalist, has anyone ever told you that?
str_F57C86AE: I don't want to talk to you right now.
str_E3484742: Contemplating the eternal, witnessing freshly dug abodes for our future selves.
str_CB97C5B1: It means this place is teeming with signs of sacrifices made for someone's life.
str_D045AAF4: Or some kind of natural energy, instinctiveness, sexuality.
str_95DA6516: Or maybe it's all together. What difference does it make anyway?
str_D9B5DD69: No difference, if it doesn't tell who killed Miranda.
str_FBFCCD08: So, have you figured out how to avoid punishment for the murder?
str_DAEF8403: What difference does it make? But if that's your strategy, at least say it in a way that makes people believe you.
str_5715C1D8: Talking to you is always a mistake.
str_DE0FC0B0: My advice to you is not to look for the killer, but for opportunities to stay free.
str_9DC35CF2: No, it's important for me to know the truth.
str_5329E7B7: You're right. I can't get to the truth.
str_BA59DD11: And what will it give you? Maybe you don't want to know it?
str_03B0F357: You don't need the truth if you want to live.
str_B1733D0E: I don't know the truth either.
str_7E2E78BA: I don't know why I'm here.
str_334C055F: I can't accept what's happening and where I am.
str_ED9CAD76: He was clearly trying to remember something, but only a grimace of confusion remained on his face.
str_6C5864E4: He looked somehow painfully familiar, yet at the same time I couldn't understand who he really was.
str_4F94C2DF: He turned to me and looked at me reproachfully, almost with tears in his eyes.
str_60E8B558: But looking at him, I felt nothing but disgust.
str_256E80ED: I hope we don't see each other again.
str_32CA5097: I stood for a while longer, watching him leave, and then continued on my way.
str_EFCC56E6: I saw Mark by the club doors.
str_388B755F: He was shifting from foot to foot, clearly waiting for someone.
str_F4267453: Suddenly I noticed that nasty old man approaching him.
str_20A9CB6E: Hiding in the bushes, I decided to eavesdrop on their conversation.
str_5D45CFB8: The old man slipped something into his hand.
str_33552730: I hope I wasn't waiting for this for nothing.
str_5EDB862F: And when have I ever let you down?
str_5B6B8B71: Mark gave him money, and the old man left.
str_FF2C8F64: What could they possibly have in common?
str_2814088F: I headed straight to the club entrance to catch Mark before he left.
str_BEEF8671: Wait, I wanted to talk to you.
str_EDC052D3: You were with Miranda that night? And don't lie, I know it.
str_250AD5AF: If you know, then why ask?
str_A089503D: I thought there was something between us, but you not only didn't tell me about it, you didn't even think to behave decently.
str_C6CD21D7: You think after a couple of days of knowing me I owe you something?
str_D9F1C62A: Listen, yes, I am like this. This is the kind of person I am. You can either accept me or not.
str_F6771E1F: What kind of person are you?
str_099BF9FC: The one you were apparently ready to sleep with to spite your friend? Or for some other reasons.
str_C8846A9B: I'm not shaming you, quite the opposite. Isn't that what's attractive about you? Such a two-faced game.
str_7A1ED3A7: And you don't want to accept me?
str_205E2A46: The one who doesn't care about the perceptions and expectations of others.
str_10EB1AE9: I'm not that kind of person.
str_1DEEC344: Despite all this, I need you right now.
str_31B42168: I was hoping you were a more pleasant person.
str_54ABE308: You don't have a good enough relationship with Mark.
str_2D77D91F: Oh, sweetheart, it seems everyone owes you. Everything probably has to be your way. What do you do when it isn't?
str_079D5692: About the fact that your hysterics are useless here. And no one believes that you're innocent.
str_45EE8718: Then to hell with all these prejudices.
str_CB87FD61: Let's have fun, let's be who we really are.
str_34909B20: You have a good relationship with Mark.
str_A1510943: Funny, but I don't need you.
str_851A40D6: You're too fake. You're afraid of yourself, afraid to admit who you are.
str_40CB8190: I shouldn't have expected anything different from you.
str_6128AF99: What connects you to that old man?
str_222CBA07: He sells drugs and something else, but what – you'd better ask him yourself.
str_DA72FB77: And now I have to go.
str_CCBCC60A: The words about drugs stuck in my head.
str_A080460B: What if it was Mark who gave them to Miranda?
str_23E4DB82: What if he is still involved, or at least responsible for my memory loss.
str_768A687B: I need to freshen up, too many thoughts today.
str_DAFB0829: I saw Edwin at the club.
str_81F2D74E: I still don't fully understand who he is or whose side he's on.
str_B5C51496: I wanted to talk to you.
str_CA27CAB4: Don't you think Mark is acting strange in all of this?
str_CBE05E7B: Again? Someone killed my friend, and I just want to get to the bottom of it.
str_2427D960: I know him – he's not a killer!
str_12F6AA0E: I don't know. Let the police handle it.
str_325088B1: Listen, I have enough problems. Today's performance got cancelled because our dancer disappeared somewhere.
str_262BA21B: She's not answering her phone, and she's not at home.
str_6CD1396A: I don't know what to do. Tomorrow is an important evening at the club, and I have no one to replace her.
str_9DAD9C28: If you could come to the club tomorrow, maybe not even to dance, at least to be a hostess?
str_9783B0F5: I don't know if I should help him. But how many more days can I stay free? What can I even expect from tomorrow?
str_30323C2C: But besides these doubts, like an electric shock, a thought struck me – Mark's ex-girlfriend has disappeared.
str_12F6CCA7: And that old man. Why is he always hanging around? He's definitely involved in something.
str_838627C2: I have to do something. I need to meet him.
str_2B018C63: It's good that I have his number.
str_879EA6E3: I quickly wrote a message to Mark asking to meet.
str_6DB54873: Too bad I don't have his number. I need to ask Edwin.
str_F55956F7: Don't ask him for the number.
str_02596CF2: Edwin's figure flashed in the doorway at the end of the club.
str_CB90839F: And I never dared to ask for his number.
str_666D67F9: Exhausted again by this day, I decided to leave the club.
str_DC71A027: Too much has fallen on me today.
str_8957B143: And I'm afraid to imagine what awaits me tomorrow.
str_6CF9994A: What could you possibly interest me with to make me agree to this?
str_C7B56D7B: Hi. I want to meet and talk.
str_B4ABBA4E: I've heard rumors that you've started an affair with the officer.
str_69A5B82A: Don't worry so much, I don't mind.
str_C1252574: I'm even for it. How about putting on a show for me?
str_44CC1BF1: I'll meet and talk with you, fine.
str_A67DE356: But in return, I want to watch how you spend time with him.
str_11DFA184: I hope you understand what I mean?
str_AC9901F6: But you need something from me, and I only want this.
str_F8D99333: I'll wait for you tomorrow evening on the rocky beach if I get the video.
str_55C098F7: I don't understand why he needs this, but I need to decide.
str_6C3CB024: Nothing special, he just has something I need.
str_17E055DA: In the drawer of the dresser in the studio where you live, there's a box.
str_034DD786: Find it, but don't open it.
str_5A666F8A: Take a photo so I know you have it.
str_7CDC4A30: I'm not sure I'll do that.
str_283310B7: Why don't you ask him to return it yourself?
str_1849256A: I'll wait for you tomorrow evening on the rocky beach if I get the photo.
str_7BE7BE35: You're living in the old man's apartment, right?
str_74426D7B: There's a hiding place under the floorboards in the apartment.
str_AA98C1A7: Find it and get the blue flash drive from there.
str_CA0AFD79: I'll wait for you tomorrow evening on the rocky beach if I get the photo.
str_9967EA99: Exactly, you have nothing to interest me with.
str_FE3ED21C: I could introduce you to my hobby.
str_BDD0E56C: If you're not afraid to sink even lower.
str_65FBD733: Aren't you afraid to please me and do everything I want?
str_06B11462: I'll wait for you tomorrow at my place.
str_0B6FA3E7: You're like a little dog – following her every step.
str_4F850A89: And all you can do is pretend to be something you're not.
str_50B28BBF: And she's tired of babysitting you.
str_A78E3D94: Could I really stoop to this?
str_EDE12D07: Should I meet with Mark like this?
str_CCC2D384: Mark blocked me in the chat and left me alone with myself.
str_4445EFA0: Myself and my anger towards Miranda.
str_C45C2DEB: To hell with it all, I'm going home.
